queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2') AND throughput_rate > 300.0 ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM "{stream}" WHERE operation_mode='auto' AND load_factor > 30.0 LIMIT 10

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, facility_zone, throughput_rate, load_factor, CASE WHEN load_factor >= 80.0 THEN 'critical' WHEN load_factor >= 50.0 THEN 'elevated' WHEN load_factor >= 20.0 THEN 'normal' ELSE 'idle' END AS load_tier, CASE WHEN cell_temp >= 30.0 THEN 'hot' WHEN cell_temp >= 22.0 THEN 'warm' ELSE 'cool' END AS temp_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE (facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2', 'ZONE-3') AND operation_mode != 'manual') OR (charge_remaining < 50.0 AND scan_attempts >= 2) ORDER BY _timestamp DESC, load_factor DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT DISTINCT sorter_model, operation_mode, facility_zone, build_signature FROM "{stream}" WHERE defect_limit BETWEEN 1.0 AND 3.0 AND runtime_hours NOT IN (24, 48, 72) AND package_size >= 300 ORDER BY sorter_model ASC, operation_mode ASC

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, conveyor_lane, load_factor, charge_remaining, ROUND((load_factor * charge_remaining) / 100.0, 2) AS utilization_index, ROUND(CAST(item_count AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(CAST(scan_attempts AS FLOAT), 0), 1) AS items_per_scan FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL AND charge_remaining IS NOT NULL AND item_count > 0 AND scan_attempts > 0 ORDER BY utilization_index DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, log, control_center, operation_mode, cell_temp, CASE WHEN cell_temp >= 35.0 AND operation_mode = 'auto' THEN 'OVERTEMP-AUTO' WHEN cell_temp >= 35.0 THEN 'OVERTEMP' WHEN cell_temp >= 28.0 AND charge_remaining < 30.0 THEN 'WARNING-LOWCHARGE' WHEN cell_temp >= 28.0 THEN 'WARM' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS alert_status FROM "{stream}" WHERE (cell_temp >= 28.0) OR (charge_remaining < 30.0 AND operation_mode != 'hybrid') ORDER BY cell_temp DESC, charge_remaining ASC LIMIT 20

results: Q026 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q026-3
Q027 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q027-3
Q026 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q026-0
Q027 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q027-0
Q028 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q028-0

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, facility_zone, throughput_rate, load_factor, charge_remaining, ROUND(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT) * (CAST(load_factor AS FLOAT) / 100.0) * (CAST(charge_remaining AS FLOAT) / 100.0), 2) AS effective_capacity FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > 300.0 AND load_factor >= 30.0 AND facility_zone != 'ZONE-4' ORDER BY effective_capacity DESC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT pallet_id, sorter_model, conveyor_lane, operation_mode, runtime_hours, ROUND(runtime_hours / 24.0, 1) AS runtime_days, CASE WHEN runtime_hours >= 500 THEN 'heavy' WHEN runtime_hours >= 168 THEN 'moderate' ELSE 'light' END AS usage_class FROM "{stream}" WHERE runtime_hours IS NOT NULL AND (sorter_model LIKE 'SORT-X%' OR sorter_model LIKE 'SORT-Z%' OR (sorter_model = 'SORT-Q5' AND runtime_hours < 200)) ORDER BY runtime_days DESC

SELECT _timestamp, control_center, facility_zone, cell_temp, COALESCE(CAST(conveyor_segment AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS segment_label, COALESCE(CAST(defect_limit AS VARCHAR), '0.0') AS defect_str FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone IN (SELECT DISTINCT facility_zone FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp > 25.0) ORDER BY cell_temp DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, build_signature, operation_mode, item_count, package_size, ROUND(CAST(item_count AS FLOAT) * CAST(package_size AS FLOAT) / 1000.0, 2) AS total_weight_kg, CASE WHEN item_count * package_size >= 300000 THEN 'XL' WHEN item_count * package_size >= 100000 THEN 'LG' WHEN item_count * package_size >= 30000 THEN 'MD' ELSE 'SM' END AS shipment_tier FROM "{stream}" WHERE item_count > 0 AND package_size > 0 ORDER BY total_weight_kg DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, scan_attempts, retry_flag, CASE WHEN scan_attempts >= 3 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS retry_flag_derived FROM (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, scan_attempts, scan_attempts >= 3 AS retry_flag FROM "{stream}") sub WHERE retry_flag = TRUE ORDER BY scan_attempts DESC

SELECT _timestamp, conveyor_lane, facility_zone, cell_temp, ambient_deviation FROM (SELECT _timestamp, conveyor_lane, facility_zone, cell_temp, ROUND(cell_temp - (SELECT AVG(cell_temp) FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone), 2) AS ambient_deviation FROM "{stream}" t1 WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL) derived WHERE ABS(ambient_deviation) > 3.0 ORDER BY ABS(ambient_deviation) DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, operation_mode, conveyor_lane, load_factor, charge_remaining, ROUND((load_factor + (100.0 - charge_remaining)) / 2.0, 2) AS stress_index, CASE WHEN load_factor > 70.0 AND charge_remaining < 30.0 THEN 'OVERLOADED' WHEN load_factor > 70.0 THEN 'HIGH_LOAD' WHEN charge_remaining < 30.0 THEN 'LOW_CHARGE' ELSE 'STABLE' END AS health_status FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY stress_index DESC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 15

SELECT DISTINCT ON (facility_zone) facility_zone, _timestamp, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, throughput_rate DESC
SELECT _timestamp, log, facility_zone, stream FROM "{stream}" WHERE stream = 'stdout' ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 15

queries.sql: SELECT risk_rules_list, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE risk_rules_list IS NOT NULL   AND TRIM(CAST(risk_rules_list AS VARCHAR)) <> ''   AND page_slug = 'itemPage' GROUP BY risk_rules_list ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, log, facility_zone, operation_mode,
  throughput_rate, load_factor, charge_remaining, cell_temp,
  item_count, defect_limit, package_size
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (facility_zone = 'ZONE-1' OR facility_zone = 'ZONE-2')
  AND (operation_mode = 'auto' OR (operation_mode = 'hybrid' AND load_factor > 50.0))
  AND throughput_rate > 100.0
  AND charge_remaining IS NOT NULL
  AND ((cell_temp >= 20.0 AND cell_temp <= 35.0) OR operation_mode = 'manual')
  AND defect_limit < 3.0
ORDER BY _timestamp DESC, throughput_rate DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, load_factor, throughput_rate,
  CASE
    WHEN load_factor >= 80.0 AND cell_temp >= 30.0 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN load_factor >= 50.0 AND cell_temp >= 25.0 THEN 'WARNING'
    WHEN load_factor >= 20.0 THEN 'NORMAL'
    WHEN charge_remaining < 20.0 THEN 'LOW_CHARGE'
    ELSE 'IDLE'
  END AS status_level,
  CASE
    WHEN throughput_rate >= 500.0 THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN throughput_rate >= 200.0 THEN 'MEDIUM'
    ELSE 'LOW'
  END AS throughput_tier
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE facility_zone != 'ZONE-4'
ORDER BY load_factor DESC, _timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20
SELECT _timestamp, concat(action_category, ' - ', action_subcategory, ' - ', error_code, ' : ', exception_message) AS display_msg FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east'
